label: End of Reconstruction / abolition shock
description: Thirteenth Amendment and post-bellum Black political enfranchisement

label: Great Migration + Red Summer
description: Great Migration north (1916–1920) and Red Summer race riots (1919); KKK revival reaching 3M members by 1924
backlash_proxy_source: NAACP 30 Years of Lynching (1919), Trelease (1971) KKK membership estimates, Moore (2003)

label: Brown v. Board of Education
description: Brown v. Board (1954) ordering school desegregation; Southern Manifesto (1956) and White Citizens' Council organizing
backlash_proxy_source: Klarman (2004) From Jim Crow to Civil Rights — WCC chapter formation data

label: Civil Rights Act
description: Civil Rights Act of 1964 / Voting Rights Act of 1965

label: MLK assassination / Kerner Commission
description: MLK assassination (April 1968), Kerner Commission report, Nixon law-and-order campaign; Southern Strategy
backlash_proxy_source: Gallup crime-panic polling 1968–1979; Carter (1996) Politics of Rage

label: Rodney King verdict / LA uprising
description: Rodney King verdict and LA uprising (April 1992); Clinton crime bill (1994) as legislative backlash
backlash_proxy_source: DOJ legislative tracker; Western (2006) Punishment and Inequality

label: Obama election
description: Election of first Black U.S. president

label: George Floyd protests / Jan 6 precursor
description: Floyd protests, racial-justice mobilisation, Jan 6 2021 Capitol attack
